Why do octopus hearts stop beating when they swim?

What is the "Rule of 72" used for in finance?

Real Impact

Apple-Style Storytelling Case Studies.

School • Delhi Public School

How DPS Transformed General Knowledge into an Active Weekly Sport for 4,000+ Students

Replacing static encyclopedic learning with QShala interactive storytelling and weekly curiosity modules increased student participation by 340%.

4,200+
Students Engaged
+88%
Retention Score
98.4%
Parent Satisfaction
“QShala turned standard GK into the most anticipated hour of the school week. Children ask "Why?" with real passion now.”
— Sunita Sharma, Principal, DPS Bangalore East
Corporate • Flipkart

Driving Hybrid Team Connection Across 12 Cities with Custom QShala Live Trivia

1,800+
Employees Joined
94%
Live Engagement Rate
92/100
NPS Score
“The energy QT and the QShala team brought to our townhalls was phenomenal. It bonded engineering and marketing seamlessly.”
— Rajesh Nair, Head of Employee Experience, Flipkart

QShala is India's curiosity learning platform that encourages creativity, curiosity, and compassion for school-going children, parents, and corporate teams.
